hooks.command: jq -re '.tool_input.command | test("(^|[[:space:]])(sudo[[:space:]]+)?nixos-rebuild")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use nh instead of nixos-rebuild. Examples: nh os switch, nh os switch --hostname Akmon, nh os test, nh os build"}}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.edits[0].file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$f")"; } 2>/dev/null || true
